use_cases: Web3/blockchain project landing pages with dark theme aesthetic
Tech startup hero sections showcasing partner integrations
SaaS landing pages with animated grid backgrounds and fade-in content
ai_summary: A dark-themed hero section component designed for Web3 and blockchain landing pages. Features a dark background with animated grid pattern, fade-in content animations, and a partner logo integration section. The component uses minimal flat design with subtle motion effects to create a modern tech aesthetic suitable for developer tools and SaaS platforms.
